raw_text:
```json
{
  "visual_type": "Educational post",
  "design_goal": "To visually anchor the psychological distinction between temporary surface relief (calming) and deep structural safety (regulation).",
  "emotional_tone": "Authoritative clarity, grounded safety, psychologically intelligent.",
  "layout_direction": "Strong vertical hierarchy or split-concept alignment. The headline should be the hero at the top, followed by a clear contrast-based layout for the body text.",
  "text_hierarchy": "Headline: 'التنظيم ليس هو التهدئة' (Large/Bold). Sub-points: Contrast between 'التهدئة' and 'التنظيم' (Medium). Closing anchor: 'حضور + شعور + اتساع' (Distinct/Italicized or boxed).",
  "color_direction": "Deep Teal (#2F6F6D) for the 'Regulation' elements and Warm Ivory (#F4EFE6) for the background to ensure high readability and a premium feel.",
  "visual_elements": ["Subtle dividing line", "Symbolic contrast (surface vs. depth)", "Clean margins", "Premium paper texture"],
  "image_prompt": "A minimalist conceptual still-life. A single, thin, floating thread on the left contrasting with a thick, deeply textured, grounded rope or woven pillar on the right. Muted teal and warm stone grey tones. Soft, diffused side-lighting casting gentle shadows. Massive negative space in the upper and center areas for Arabic typography. High-end editorial photography, clean composition, profoundly calm and stable atmosphere.",
  "avoid": ["Clipart of brains", "Medical diagrams", "Stock photos of people meditating", "Neon colors", "Chaotic layouts", "Aggressive arrows"],
  "reasoning_summary": "This post is a conceptual 'Concept Contrast.' The visual uses a symbolic metaphor of surface vs. depth to mirror the text's message that regulation is a deeper, more grounded state than simple calming, while the layout provides the structured clarity needed for educational content."
}
```

parsed.design_goal: To visually anchor the psychological distinction between temporary surface relief (calming) and deep structural safety (regulation).
parsed.emotional_tone: Authoritative clarity, grounded safety, psychologically intelligent.
parsed.layout_direction: Strong vertical hierarchy or split-concept alignment. The headline should be the hero at the top, followed by a clear contrast-based layout for the body text.

parsed.color_direction: Deep Teal (#2F6F6D) for the 'Regulation' elements and Warm Ivory (#F4EFE6) for the background to ensure high readability and a premium feel.
parsed.image_prompt: A minimalist conceptual still-life. A single, thin, floating thread on the left contrasting with a thick, deeply textured, grounded rope or woven pillar on the right. Muted teal and warm stone grey tones. Soft, diffused side-lighting casting gentle shadows. Massive negative space in the upper and center areas for Arabic typography. High-end editorial photography, clean composition, profoundly calm and stable atmosphere.
parsed.reasoning_summary: This post is a conceptual 'Concept Contrast.' The visual uses a symbolic metaphor of surface vs. depth to mirror the text's message that regulation is a deeper, more grounded state than simple calming, while the layout provides the structured clarity needed for educational content.
